.msg.tool  { background: #2e3330; border: 1px solid #474; }
summary { cursor:pointer; }
</style>

I picked object tagged as 4 and placed it near the indoor plant at position close to P17. Then, I picked the glass tagged as 37 and placed it next to the plate close to the reference point P24. Task completed as requested.
